name: IRC_EMP_EVENTS_B
description: This is the base table to store the employee event basic details

columns.Name: EMP_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. Auto generated.

columns.Name: EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The unique number which gets generated to represent an employee event.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the start date of the employee event.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the end date of the employee event.

columns.Name: LAST_REGISTER_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last date of the registration of the employee event.

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: Timezone code of the employee event

columns.Name: STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Status of the employee event which is configured in HCM_LOOKUP table. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_EMP_EVENT_STATUS.

columns.Name: STATUS_UPDATED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date in which the status is changed for the employee event

columns.Name: VISIBILITY_CODE
columns.Comments: Visibility code of the employee event which is configured in HCM_LOOKUP table. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_EMP_EVENT_VISIBILITY.

columns.Name: CREATION_CODE
columns.Comments: The creation mode of the employee event which is configured in HCM_LOOKUP table. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_EMP_EVENT_CREATION.

columns.Name: EVENT_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date in which the event details is last modified

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Object as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OBJECT_STATUS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BANNER_IMAGE_URL
columns.Comments: URL of the banner image selected by the user
